free_text: Production of heavy actinides from interactions of
form of Cm-F/3 deposited with a diam. of 6.5 mm on
2.65 mg/cm2 'Be' foil. Gold foils, 19.5 mm in diam.
and 2 mg/cm2 thick, were placed 3 mm from the target
Corrections were made for growth and decay and beam
intensity fluctuations during irradiation with an
* chemical yield, by standard statistical methods.
/By authors/ Authors assumed that 100% of products of
interest recoiled out of the target and were caught
Updated to new EXFOR rules, date formats, lower case.
SD: Small corrections in several Subents.
Several Subents were split according to EXFOR rules.

/By authors/ No absolute gamma ray-intensity data are
available, but our measurements show that 0.177 keV
level is deexcited by a 0.177 MeV gamma
